scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types accurately, explains identity/deduplication implicitly, covers ops event pattern, CLI usage, and event object properties correctly.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'ops.testing' section introduces testing APIs (testing.Notice, testing.Context, ctx.on.pebble_custom_notice) that may not exist exactly as described — the gold standard doesn't mention testing patterns, so these can't be verified and may be hallucinated or slightly off.
